name: Cashew Noodles
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
2. Cook noodles according to package directions. Drain well.
3. In a medium bowl, combine cottage cheese and the remaining ingredients. Stir until well mixed.
4. Add the cottage cheese mixture to the noodle mixture and toss gently.
5. Pour the combined mixture into a buttered 2-quart casserole dish.
6. Sprinkle with Parmesan cheese.
7. Bake, uncovered, for 25 minutes or until thoroughly heated.
